summary: Completed testing of FOMO Arena Win Card System and Monetization Layer. Backend APIs are functional with minor validation issues. Frontend loads correctly with full navigation and modal functionality.

validation_issues.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 for invalid ObjectId format
validation_issues.impact: Poor error handling for invalid bet IDs

validation_issues.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 for invalid ObjectId format
validation_issues.impact: Poor error handling for invalid duel IDs

validation_issues.issue: Returns 500 instead of 404 for invalid ObjectId format
validation_issues.impact: Poor error handling for invalid position IDs

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay prevents clicking when Create Market modal is open

passed_tests: Recent wins API /api/share/wins/recent with wallet header
Navigation between Arena and Duels tabs
Duels page with statistics and history

success_percentage.backend: 67% (6/9 tests passed - core APIs working, validation needs improvement)
success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 tests passed - one minor modal overlay issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix ObjectId validation in backend APIs to return proper 400/404 status codes instead of 500 errors for invalid IDs. Improve modal overlay z-index handling in frontend.
